description: An ACM/SIGAPP symposium covering a broad range of applied computing, organized into multiple tracks including software engineering, AI, and security. It is a large-scale conference that facilitates cross-disciplinary exchange among researchers from diverse fields.

bestPapers.paperTitle: RAGCol: RAG-Based Automatic Video Colorization Through Text Caption Generation and Knowledge Enrichment

descriptionKo: 응용 컴퓨팅 전반을 다루는 ACM/SIGAPP 학회로, 소프트웨어 공학, AI, 보안 등 다양한 트랙으로 구성된다. 폭넓은 주제를 다루는 대규모 학회이며, 여러 분야의 연구자들이 교류하는 장이다.
descriptionEn: An ACM/SIGAPP symposium covering a broad range of applied computing, organized into multiple tracks including software engineering, AI, and security. It is a large-scale conference that facilitates cross-disciplinary exchange among researchers from diverse fields.
